Target brief requires 16 fields. 11 absent: report_story_priority, primary_finding_reason, confidence_summary, evidence_for, evidence_against, missing_or_limiting_evidence, system_context, marker_context, next_step_intent, section_visibility, required_caveats, future_llm_translation_constraints. backend/core/contracts/narrative_payload_v1.py lines 30-35 (NarrativeSectionIdV1): 5 sections — retail_summary, lead_narrative, body_overview, next_steps_narrative, clinician_synthesis. Required sections: 9 (hero/main finding, primary finding and why, what is working well, health systems context, patterns across body, marker evidence, missing evidence/confidence limitations, what to do next, technical/clinician detail). 4 sections have no current enum ID: health_systems_context (conflated into body_overview), patterns_across_body, marker_evidence, missing_evidence_confidence_limitations. Sprint must add new section IDs or defer with rationale.

backend/core/analytics/narrative_payload_builder_v1.py lines 22-65 (_default_section_intents): builds 5 NarrativeSectionIntentV1 objects. Each carries only section_id, intent_code, permitted_source_fields. No per-section evidence_boundary, visibility, forbidden_claim, or caveat fields — these are report-level only in NarrativeClaimBoundaryV1. Builder does not carry: report_story_priority, confidence_summary, score_hierarchy_guidance, future_llm_translation_constraints. Full extension needed for the target brief model.

backend/core/contracts/narrative_payload_v1.py line 45: NarrativeSectionIntentV1 uses model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid'). backend/core/contracts/narrative_payload_v1.py line 69 context: NarrativePayloadV1 also uses ConfigDict(extra='forbid'). Any new fields added to NarrativePayloadV1 or NarrativeSectionIntentV1 must be Optional with defaults or all construction sites must be updated in lockstep. Missing defaults will cause Pydantic validation errors at all existing instantiation sites. Cursor must audit all NarrativePayloadV1 and NarrativeSectionIntentV1 construction sites before extending the schema.
